title: Not Found
description: Redstone controls for Valkyrie Ships in 1.19
body:
# Not Found

*it's called Not Found because "Eureka!" the addon I use with VS to construct ships means "I have found"* 

![The blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TFVHRHkD/images/fec4008df7fdcd079cb730d256383f6336a9779b.png)


A somewhat janky redstone control implementation for valkyrie skies

there are blocks named "Redstone Ship Mover [direction]" which are craftable with glass, a redstone block and amethyst blocks (I'd reccomend checking JEI or REI or EMI) that when powered by redstone will allign your ship to the axis and then start travelling in that direction.

This does theoretically mean you can use something like ComputerCraft to automate your Valkyrie Ships now. Have fun!
